[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [6°01′21″N 101°58′09″E﻿ / ﻿6.02254°N 101.96918°E﻿ / 6.02254; 101.96918](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Rantau_Panjang&params=6.02254_N_101.96918_E_type:city_source:enwiki)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Town in Malaysia

For the federal constituency represented in the Dewan Rakyat, see [Rantau Panjang (federal constituency)](/wiki/Rantau_Panjang_(federal_constituency) "Rantau Panjang (federal constituency)").

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/08/95591405_0053b3c289_o.jpg/250px-95591405_0053b3c289_o.jpg)](/wiki/File:95591405_0053b3c289_o.jpg)

Rantau Panjang townscape

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3d/Pusat_Pemeriksaan_Kastam_Zon_Bebas_Cukai%2C_Rantau_Panjang%2C_Pasir_Mas%2C_Kelantan_-_panoramio_-_Gula_Kapas.jpg/250px-Pusat_Pemeriksaan_Kastam_Zon_Bebas_Cukai%2C_Rantau_Panjang%2C_Pasir_Mas%2C_Kelantan_-_panoramio_-_Gula_Kapas.jpg)](/wiki/File:Pusat_Pemeriksaan_Kastam_Zon_Bebas_Cukai,_Rantau_Panjang,_Pasir_Mas,_Kelantan_-_panoramio_-_Gula_Kapas.jpg)

Rantau Panjang Immigration, Customs, Quarantine, and Security (ICQS) Complex

**Rantau Panjang** ([Kelantanese](/wiki/Kelantanese "Kelantanese"): *Ghata Panjey*; [Jawi](/wiki/Jawi_script "Jawi script"): رنتاو ڤنجڠ) is a *[mukim](/wiki/Mukim "Mukim")* (subdistrict/commune) and also a parliamentary constituency in [Pasir Mas District](/wiki/Pasir_Mas_District "Pasir Mas District"), [Kelantan](/wiki/Kelantan "Kelantan"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"), located next to the [Thai border](/wiki/Malaysia-Thailand_border "Malaysia-Thailand border").

The town of [Su-ngai Kolok](/wiki/Su-ngai_Kolok "Su-ngai Kolok") is situated adjacent to Rantau Panjang on the Thai side of the border, right across the [Golok River](/wiki/Golok_River "Golok River"). Both towns are linked via the [Rantau Panjang-Sungai Golok Bridge](/wiki/Rantau_Panjang-Sungai_Golok_Bridge "Rantau Panjang-Sungai Golok Bridge"), popularly known as the Harmony Bridge ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Jambatan Muhibbah*).

Along with [Pengkalan Kubor](/wiki/Pengkalan_Kubor "Pengkalan Kubor") on the [South China Sea](/wiki/South_China_Sea "South China Sea") coast, Rantau Panjang is a popular place for [duty-free shopping](/wiki/Duty-free_shopping "Duty-free shopping"). In that respect, Rantau Panjang depends heavily on domestic and Thai tourists.[[1]](#cite_note-LifeinPenang-1)
